Adam Arous.note: Tunisia's young centre-back option, useful for front-foot defending and covering space behind the line.
Adam Arous.noteZh: 阿德姆·阿鲁斯是突尼斯年轻中卫选择，适合主动上抢并保护防线身后空间。

Ali Abdi.summary: Ali Abdi is a Tunisia left-back at Nice who gives the national team overlap timing, crossing quality, and wide defending.
Ali Abdi.note: Tunisia's experienced left-back outlet, able to defend the flank and still add early service forward.
Ali Abdi.noteZh: 阿里·阿卜迪是突尼斯经验丰富的左后卫出口，能防守边路，也能向前送出早传。

Amine Ben Hmida.summary: Mohamed Amine Ben Hamida is a Tunisia left-back at Espérance de Tunis who gives the national team defensive width, left-footed balance, and tournament experience.
Amine Ben Hmida.note: Tunisia's left-back stabilizer, important for defensive width and safer possession on the outside.
Amine Ben Hmida.noteZh: 穆罕默德·阿明·本·哈米达是突尼斯左后卫稳定点，对防守宽度和边路安全控球很重要。

Anis Slimane.summary: Anis Ben Slimane is a Tunisia attacking midfielder at Norwich City who gives the national team carrying power, between-lines receiving, and midfield height.
Anis Slimane.note: Tunisia's rangy attacking midfielder, useful for carrying through pressure and joining the front line late.
Anis Slimane.noteZh: 阿尼斯·本·斯利曼是突尼斯高大型攻击中场，适合在压力下带球推进并后插上支援锋线。

Aymen Dahmen.note: Tunisia's steady goalkeeper option, trusted for box command and calm handling in long defensive spells.
Aymen Dahmen.noteZh: 艾门·达门是突尼斯稳健的门将选择，长时间防守时能提供禁区指挥和冷静处理。

Dylan Bronn.note: Tunisia's experienced centre-back, valuable for organizing the line and winning direct balls into the box.
Dylan Bronn.noteZh: 迪伦·布隆是突尼斯经验型中卫，能组织防线并赢下打入禁区的直接球。

Elias Achouri.note: Tunisia's lively wide creator, able to combine quickly and keep full-backs under pressure.
Elias Achouri.noteZh: 埃利亚斯·阿舒里是突尼斯活跃的边路创造者，能快速配合并持续压迫边后卫。

Elias Saad.note: Tunisia's left-side accelerator, dangerous when he drives inside before the defense is settled.
Elias Saad.noteZh: 埃利亚斯·萨阿德是突尼斯左路加速点，在防守站稳前内切推进时很危险。

Ellyes Skhiri.note: Tunisia's midfield anchor, built to protect the centre and move the next pass without fuss.
Ellyes Skhiri.noteZh: 埃利斯·斯希里是突尼斯中场锚点，负责保护中路并干净利落地推进下一脚传球。

Firas Chaouat.note: Tunisia's penalty-box striker option, useful when they need a target and a simpler route to goal.
Firas Chaouat.noteZh: 菲拉斯·绍瓦特是突尼斯禁区中锋选择，球队需要支点和更直接的进球路线时很有用。

Hannibal Mejbri.note: Tunisia's high-intensity midfielder, able to lift the tempo with pressure, carries, and aggressive passes.
Hannibal Mejbri.noteZh: 汉尼拔·梅布里是突尼斯高强度中场，能用压迫、带球和积极传球提升节奏。

Hazem Mastouri.note: Tunisia's mobile striker, useful for chasing centre-backs and arriving quickly around loose balls.
Hazem Mastouri.noteZh: 哈泽姆·马斯图里是突尼斯机动型前锋，适合追压中卫并快速赶到散落球附近。

Ismael Gharbi.note: Tunisia's technical attacking midfielder, able to add quick feet and small-space passing around the box.
Ismael Gharbi.noteZh: 伊斯梅尔·加尔比是突尼斯技术型攻击中场，能在禁区周围带来快脚和小空间传球。

Khalil Ayari.note: Tunisia's young winger, useful for changing the rhythm with direct carries and fearless isolation play.
Khalil Ayari.noteZh: 哈利勒·阿亚里是突尼斯年轻边锋，能用直接带球和大胆一对一改变节奏。

Mohamed Hadj Mahmoud.note: Tunisia's central midfield cover, valuable for second balls and keeping possession from breaking open.
Mohamed Hadj Mahmoud.noteZh: 穆罕默德·贝勒哈吉·马哈茂德是突尼斯中场保护选择，能争第二落点并避免控球被打散。

Montassar Talbi.note: Tunisia's defensive leader, important for organizing the line and handling aerial pressure.
Montassar Talbi.noteZh: 蒙塔萨尔·塔尔比是突尼斯防守领袖，对组织防线和处理空中压力很重要。

Mortadha Ben Ouanes.note: Tunisia's left-side runner, able to play high or deep and keep the flank moving forward.
Mortadha Ben Ouanes.noteZh: 穆尔塔达·本·瓦内斯是突尼斯左路跑动点，能踢高位或低位，并让边路持续向前。

Mouhib Chamakh.summary: Abdelmouhib Chamakh is a Tunisia goalkeeper at Club Africain who gives the national team shot-stopping depth, height, and domestic title-winning rhythm.
Mouhib Chamakh.note: Tunisia's tall goalkeeper option, bringing shot-stopping depth and confidence from a strong club season.
Mouhib Chamakh.noteZh: 阿卜杜勒穆希卜·沙马克是突尼斯高大门将选择，带来扑救深度和强势俱乐部赛季后的信心。

Moutaz Neffati.note: Tunisia's young right-back option, useful for overlap support and recovery speed down the flank.
Moutaz Neffati.noteZh: 穆塔兹·内法蒂是突尼斯年轻右后卫选择，适合套边支援和边路回追。

Omar Rekik.note: Tunisia's centre-back depth, giving them size, aerial cover, and another left-sided defensive option.
Omar Rekik.noteZh: 奥马尔·雷基克是突尼斯中卫深度选择，能提供身材、空中覆盖和另一名左侧防守选择。

Raed Chikhaoui.summary: Raed Chikhaoui is a Tunisia centre-back at US Monastir who gives the national team size, aerial defending, and fresh back-line depth.
Raed Chikhaoui.note: Tunisia's young centre-back depth, useful for adding size and contesting crosses late in matches.
Raed Chikhaoui.noteZh: 拉埃德·希哈维是突尼斯年轻中卫深度，适合增加身高并在比赛后段争顶传中。

Rani Khedira.note: Tunisia's disciplined midfield shield, useful for closing central lanes and calming difficult phases.
Rani Khedira.noteZh: 拉尼·赫迪拉是突尼斯纪律性强的中场屏障，适合封住中路线路并稳定困难阶段。

Rayan Elloumi.note: Tunisia's teenage forward runner, able to stretch tired defenders and press with fresh energy.
Rayan Elloumi.noteZh: 拉扬·埃卢米是突尼斯十几岁的前锋跑动点，能拉扯疲惫后卫并用新鲜体能压迫。

Sabri Ben Hessen.note: Tunisia's domestic goalkeeper cover, bringing reaction saves and familiarity with tense local matches.
Sabri Ben Hessen.noteZh: 萨布里·本·赫森是突尼斯本土门将保障，带来反应扑救和紧张本土比赛经验。

Sebastian Tounekti.note: Tunisia's flexible winger, able to carry directly and keep both touchline and inside routes alive.
Sebastian Tounekti.noteZh: 塞巴斯蒂安·图内克蒂是突尼斯灵活边锋，能直接带球并同时保持边线和内线路线。

Yan Valery.note: Tunisia's right-back power runner, useful for carrying up the flank and recovering into defensive duels.
Yan Valery.noteZh: 扬·瓦莱里是突尼斯力量型右后卫，适合沿边路推进并回到防守对抗中。
